SEARCH
Module org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject
Package org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs

Class StatisticsTab

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.control.Tab
org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.StatisticsTab
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class StatisticsTab extends javafx.scene.control.Tab
JavaFX tab for displaying statistical insights of games in the library using a pie chart. This tab dynamically aggregates game data by selected category (Platform or Developer) and visualizes it. Design Choices: Uses in-memory aggregation to avoid additional database queries and applies animation to enhance user experience.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Faariz Sheikh
Date:
2026-03-17

  • Field Details

    • gt

      private final GameTable gt
      Singleton instance of GameTable used to retrieve game data for statistical analysis.

      private final javafx.scene.chart.PieChart chart

  • Constructor Details

    • StatisticsTab

      public StatisticsTab()
      Constructs the StatisticsTab and initializes UI components, including the selector for grouping and the pie chart.

  • Method Details

    • updateChart

      private void updateChart(String type)
      Updates the pie chart data based on the selected grouping type. Aggregates game counts by either platform or developer and calculates percentage distribution for visualization.
      Parameters:
      type - grouping type ("Platform" or "Developer")

    • playAnimation

      private void playAnimation()
      Plays a scale animation on the pie chart to enhance visual presentation when data is updated.
